description:
Advances: specled.spec_review

Today a subject's binding health is only inferable by clicking into Coverage and reading the bindings <dl> (lib/specled_ex/review/html.ex:1132-1150). Surface it on the subject card header (subject_template, html.ex:628-664) alongside the existing change/finding badges:

- "0 bindings (no realized_by declared)"
- "N bindings, K dangling"
- "N bindings, all valid"

Pulls from subject.bindings + the dangling-binding finding count for that subject. This makes binding state visible during triage instead of forcing a tab-dive.
title: Per-subject binding-health callout on subject card header
